creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for the submission, and again I apologize for the long time it 
has taken for us to get to this. 

As a note for future submissions, when you increase the version of a 
port, please drop PORTREVISION and provide a summary of changes and, 
especially in cases like where where you drop some functionality, do 
mention that and provide some rationale, please.
